productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Beads Silver Clutch
description: A perfect option to go with your dresses, this silver clutch from lino perros comes with a glossy upper and a spacious inner to hold your party essentials. Dimensions : 8 cm x 22 cm Silicon stone encrusted upper with a press clasp One main compartment with fabric lining and a pouch inside A detachable shoulder chain Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
